title: ContextSource Unificada — transcripts + planilhas + GitHub compartilhados Vitor/Vitoria

userStories.title: Migration A — criar tabela ContextSource + enum + RLS
userStories.description: Criar supabase/migrations/20260530a_create_context_source.sql com CREATE TYPE context_source_kind, CREATE TABLE ContextSource com colunas/índices/RLS conforme §7-A. Rodar via psql DIRECT_URL. Atualizar src/lib/supabase/database.types.ts.

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT count(*) FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='ContextSource'"

userStories.title: Migration B — DesignSessionContextLink + RLS
userStories.description: Criar 20260530b_create_design_session_context_link.sql conforme §7-B. Rodar via psql. Atualizar database.types.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Tabela criada com FK + unique constraint

userStories.title: Migration C — PMReviewContextLink + RLS + helpers can_view/edit_pm_review
userStories.description: Criar 20260530c_create_pm_review_context_link.sql análogo ao B, com helpers can_view_pm_review/can_edit_pm_review se não existirem.

userStories.title: Migration D — backfill TranscriptRef → ContextSource
userStories.description: 20260530d_backfill_transcripts_into_context_source.sql idempotente (INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). Preservar id. kind='transcript', payload com source/roamId, fullText, summary, capturedAt.
acceptanceCriteria: ID preservation: cada TranscriptRef.id existe em ContextSource com mesmo id

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM \"TranscriptRef\") = (SELECT count(*) FROM \"ContextSource\" WHERE kind='transcript')"

source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM \"TranscriptRef\") = (SELECT count(*) FROM \"ContextSource\" cs JOIN \"TranscriptRef\" t ON cs.id = t.id WHERE cs.kind = 'transcript')"

userStories.title: Migration E — backfill Meetings linkados → ContextSource
userStories.description: 20260530e_backfill_meetings_into_context_source.sql. ContextSource kind='meeting' por Meeting referenciado em PMReviewMeetingLink. externalId=meetingId, title, capturedAt=startsAt, summary, projectId. Idempotente.
acceptanceCriteria: Count: distinct meetingId em PMReviewMeetingLink == count ContextSource kind='meeting'

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT (SELECT count(DISTINCT \"meetingId\") FROM \"PMReviewMeetingLink\") = (SELECT count(*) FROM \"ContextSource\" WHERE kind='meeting')"

userStories.title: Migration F — backfill DS transcript links
userStories.description: 20260530f_backfill_ds_transcript_links.sql. INSERT em DesignSessionContextLink SELECT FROM DesignSessionTranscriptLink. Idempotente.

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM \"DesignSessionTranscriptLink\") = (SELECT count(*) FROM \"DesignSessionContextLink\")"

userStories.title: Migration G — backfill PM Review links (transcript + meeting → context)
userStories.description: 20260530g_backfill_pm_review_links.sql. Dois INSERTs no mesmo arquivo (atomic batch): transcript links → PMReviewContextLink direto; meeting links resolvem meetingId → contextSourceId via JOIN com ContextSource kind='meeting'. Idempotente.

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT ((SELECT count(*) FROM \"PMReviewTranscriptLink\") + (SELECT count(*) FROM \"PMReviewMeetingLink\")) = (SELECT count(*) FROM \"PMReviewContextLink\")"

userStories.title: Adapters base + read_context_source tool (factory)
userStories.description: Criar src/lib/context-sources/adapters/{transcript,meeting,csv,gsheets,github}.ts. Cada exporta resolveContent(supabase, source). Csv/gsheets/github stub aqui. Criar src/lib/agent/tools/read-context-source.ts com factory createReadContextSourceTool, valida Zod, dispatcha. read-transcript-content vira wrapper.

userStories.title: GitHub adapter via Composio (reuse)
userStories.description: src/lib/context-sources/adapters/github.ts: parser de URL (regex github.com/{owner}/{repo}, .../pull/{n}, .../issues/{n}), dispatch por kind. Chama GITHUB_GET_REPOSITORY_CONTENT/GET_PULL_REQUEST/GET_AN_ISSUE via cliente Composio do member. fullText em markdown. Sem conexão → lança ComposioConnectionMissing('github') → endpoint retorna 412 + connectUrl. NÃO mexer em src/lib/github.ts (legacy, sem uso).

userStories.title: CSV adapter + GSheets via Composio (opt-in)
userStories.description: CSV: csv-parse + bucket 'context-source-files' (migration j). Snapshot, sem refresh. GSheets: expandir tipo toolkit em composio/client.ts pra aceitar 'googlesheets'. Adapter chama GOOGLESHEETS_GET_SPREADSHEET_VALUES via Composio. Sem COMPOSIO_GSHEETS_AUTH_CONFIG_ID OU member sem conexão → ComposioConnectionMissing. NÃO instalar googleapis SDK.

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT count(*) FROM storage.buckets WHERE id='context-source-files'"

userStories.title: API endpoints unificados de ContextSource
userStories.description: POST/GET/refresh em /api/context-sources/*. GET/POST/DELETE link em /api/design-sessions/[id]/context/* e /api/pm-reviews/[id]/context/*. Zod validation. RLS via supabase client. Multipart pra CSV.

verifiable.command_or_query: find src/app/api/context-sources src/app/api/design-sessions/*/context src/app/api/pm-reviews/*/context -name 'route.ts' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '

userStories.title: UI — ContextInsumosSheet com tabs por kind + modais import
userStories.description: ContextLinkList aceita kind no item (badge). ContextInsumosSheet ganha Tabs (shadcn): Tudo/Transcripts/Planilhas/GitHub. Botão 'Importar novo' vira DropdownMenu (3 itens, abre modal). spreadsheet-modal (CSV toggle | GSheets URL) e github-source-modal (URL + detect kind + preview). PROIBIDO criar modais ou wrapper de sheet em src/components/{pm-review,design-session}/ — tudo mora em src/components/agent/context-import/ pra Vitor e Vitoria reusarem identicamente.

userStories.title: Wiring Vitor + Vitoria com read_context_source + endpoints novos
userStories.description: Vitor (tools/index/prompt): substitui read_transcript_content por read_context_source; lista 'Fontes linkadas' por kind. Vitoria idem. UI Vitor pre-work: trocar fetcher pra /api/design-sessions/[id]/context. CRÍTICO: NÃO reintroduzir ContextRibbon como linha separada — chip de insumos é injetado no StepSubHeader via useProvideStepActions (padrão já implementado em src/components/design-session/ribbon/step-actions-context.tsx). UI Vitoria PM Review: trocar fetcher pra /api/pm-reviews/[id]/context; manter botão Insumos na ribbon na posição atual.
acceptanceCriteria: pre-work-step.tsx NÃO contém <ContextRibbon (regra D15 + paridade visual com Vitoria)
pre-work-step.tsx usa useProvideStepActions pra injetar chip

verifiable.command_or_query: grep -c 'read_context_source' src/lib/agent/agents/vitor/tools.ts src/lib/agent/agents/vitoria/tools.ts | awk -F: '{s+=$2} END {print s}'
grep -c 'read_context_source' src/lib/agent/agents/vitor/prompt.ts src/lib/agent/agents/vitoria/prompt.ts | awk -F: '{s+=$2} END {print s}'

userStories.title: Parity check — Vitor e Vitoria consomem os MESMOS primitivos
userStories.description: Verificação automatizada da regra D15. Garante que pre-work-step (Vitor) e pm-review-insumos-sheet (Vitoria) importam ContextInsumosSheet do mesmo path (@/components/agent/context-import/) e que não há cópias em pastas por agente. Smoke browser confirma estrutura idêntica do sheet (mesmas tabs, mesmo dropdown 'Importar novo', mesmos modais).
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke browser: estrutura visual idêntica entre Vitor e Vitoria

verifiable.command_or_query: Abrir Vitor pre-work (DS qualquer) → chip 'Insumos' no header → comparar com PM Review → botão Insumos. Estrutura idêntica.
verifiable.expected: Mesmas tabs, mesmo dropdown 'Importar novo', mesmos modais ao clicar em cada kind

userStories.title: Migration H — drop link tables legados
userStories.description: 20260530h_drop_legacy_link_tables.sql. DROP TABLE PMReviewTranscriptLink, PMReviewMeetingLink, DesignSessionTranscriptLink CASCADE. Só depois de CTXSRC-013. TranscriptRef fica.
acceptanceCriteria: Smoke: linkar/deslinkar transcript em DS continua funcionando

verifiable.command_or_query: source <(grep '^DIRECT_URL=' .env | sed 's/^/export /') && psql "$DIRECT_URL" -t -c "SELECT to_regclass('public.\"DesignSessionTranscriptLink\"') IS NULL AND to_regclass('public.\"PMReviewTranscriptLink\"') IS NULL"
Linkar e deslinkar 1 transcript via UI Vitor e PM Review

userStories.deferredReason: Drop legacy adiado: pm-review.ts tem 12 refs, insumo-pool.ts tem 4 refs, vitoria/pm-review.ts tem 2 refs. Dropar agora quebra. Migra-se em PRD futuro de cleanup.

userStories.title: Promover planning/context-sheet.tsx como primitivo ContextSheet (Pills pattern)
userStories.description: Criar src/components/agent/context-import/context-sheet.tsx como primitivo canônico baseado 1:1 em planning/context-sheet.tsx (pattern Pills + InlinePanel + 3 modais). Generalizar via props: ritualLabel (string, ex Planning/PM Review/DS), linkedItems (array), capabilities ({transcript, spreadsheet, github}), handlers (onLink/onUnlink/onImportNew). Header title format: Contexto da [ritualLabel]. Pills compactos rounded com counts dinâmicos. Sem Tabs. Sem DropdownMenu. Modais separados (TranscriptModal/SpreadsheetImportModal/GitHubRepoModal). Sheet fecha antes de modal abrir.
acceptanceCriteria: Exporta default ContextSheet com Props interface tipada
Pattern Pills + InlinePanel preservado de planning/context-sheet.tsx
Sem uso de Tabs / DropdownMenu (são patterns errados)

userStories.title: Migrar pm-review-insumos-sheet.tsx para usar ContextSheet primitivo + renomear Insumos→Contexto
userStories.description: Refatorar src/components/pm-review/pm-review-insumos-sheet.tsx para usar o novo ContextSheet primitivo (CTXSRC-016). Renomear arquivo para src/components/pm-review/pm-review-context-sheet.tsx. Atualizar callers do PM Review: botão Insumos vira Contexto (label e ícone). Substituir ContextInsumosSheet por ContextSheet. Linked meetings rendem como Pills tipo reunião dentro do mesmo padrão.
acceptanceCriteria: Callers do PM Review atualizados (label Contexto)

userStories.title: Migrar planning/context-sheet.tsx (dogfood) + sprint-context-sheet.tsx + DS Vitor para usar primitivo + cleanup ContextInsumosSheet
userStories.description: Refatorar src/components/planning/context-sheet.tsx como thin wrapper que usa o novo ContextSheet primitivo (CTXSRC-016) — dogfood. Refatorar src/components/sprint/sprint-context-sheet.tsx para usar o mesmo primitivo. Migrar callers da DS Vitor (qualquer lugar que use ContextInsumosSheet com tabs). Deletar src/components/agent/context-import/context-insumos-sheet.tsx (pattern errado). Garantir coesão visual cross-ritual.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero referências a Insumos/ContextInsumosSheet em src/
